compiled_state.title: Write RED test for run-overlay-retrospective.sh default output path

compiled_state.description:
Write a failing test that verifies run-overlay-retrospective.sh does NOT write dev artifacts to plugins/dso/docs/. The test should invoke the script (or inspect its source) to confirm the default OUTPUT path does not resolve to any path under plugins/dso/. Test must be RED before the fix in T3 is applied.

Acceptance criteria:
- Test exists at tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh (or equivalent)
- Test asserts that the default output path in run-overlay-retrospective.sh is NOT under plugins/dso/
- Test is executable (chmod +x)
- Test FAILS (RED) against the current source (output path is plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md)
- Test entry added to .test-index
